description: You are a P&C Actuarial Analyst at an insurance company completing the annual reserve review for the Workers Compensation line of business. Using the workbook 'workers_comp_triangle.xlsx' in the ExcelTasks folder on the Desktop, perform a loss development analysis across the 'Triangle', 'LDF_Development', and 'IBNR_Reserve' sheets. In the 'LDF_Development' sheet, calculate the individual age-to-age LDFs and the volume-weighted average LDFs for each development period (calculated as the sum of later-period values divided by the sum of corresponding earlier-period values from the 'Triangle' sheet). Complete the CDF-to-Ultimate table for accident years 2019-2023 by sequencing the volume-weighted LDFs and applying the tail factor from cell B12. In the 'IBNR_Reserve' sheet, calculate the Projected Ultimate, IBNR Reserve, and IBNR % of Ultimate for each accident year, setting the Adequacy Flag to 'UNDER_RESERVED' if the IBNR % exceeds 20%. Sum the Current Paid, Projected Ultimate, and IBNR Reserve columns in row 10 and save the workbook.

metadata.occupation: P&C Insurance Actuaries / Loss Reserve Analysts
metadata.dataset: NAIC Schedule P Workers Compensation cumulative paid loss triangle, AY 2019-2023; development factors consistent with NAIC Annual Statistical Bulletin 2023 WC industry aggregates (VW LDF 12-24 range 1.40-1.45, 24-36 range 1.13-1.21); URL: https://content.naic.org/sites/default/files/statistical-studies-annual-statistical-bulletin.htm
